events.title: Full Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea
events.description: Bhakti Bliss Bali's monthly full moon edition at Dragon Tea Temple — the September gathering in their ongoing Kirtan & Sacred Tea series. The evening opens at 5:45 PM with sacred space-setting, moves into BhakTea Kirtan at 6 PM (devotional chanting woven with ceremonial tea), arcs into ecstatic dance by fire at 8 PM, and closes with Cosmic Sound Healing at 9:15 PM. Capacity is capped at 55. Dress: white or colourful. Dance-only entry available from 8 PM.
events.short_description: Bhakti Bliss Bali's monthly full moon gathering at Dragon Tea Temple — kirtan, sacred tea, ecstatic dance by fire, and sound healing under the September moon.
events.price_info: IDR 300,000 early bird / IDR 350,000 presale / IDR 400,000 door; dance-only from 8 PM: IDR 150,000
